originContent: NoneBot DeepSeek 插件。接入 DeepSeek 模型，提供智能对话与问答功能
translatedContent: NoneBot DeepSeek plugin. Integrates the DeepSeek model, providing intelligent dialogue and Q&A capabilities.

originContent: > **收藏项目**，你将从 GitHub 上无延迟地接收所有发布通知～⭐️
translatedContent: > **Star the project**, you will receive all release notifications from GitHub without delay～⭐️

originContent: 以下提到的方法任选 **其一** 即可
translatedContent: You can choose **either one** of the methods mentioned below

originContent: > 想要启用 Markdown 转图片功能，需安装 `nonebot-plugin-deepseek[image]`
translatedContent: > To enable Markdown to image conversion, you need to install `nonebot-plugin-deepseek[image]`

originContent: <summary>[推荐] 使用 nb-cli 安装</summary>
在 Bot 的根目录下打开命令行, 输入以下指令即可安装
translatedContent: Open the command line in the root directory of the Bot and enter the following command to install

originContent: 打开 NoneBot 项目根目录下的配置文件, 在 `[plugin]` 部分追加写入
translatedContent: Open the configuration file in the root directory of the NoneBot project, and append the following under the `[plugin]` section

originContent: 在项目的配置文件中添加下表中配置
translatedContent: Add the configurations in the table below to the project's configuration file

originContent: > `api_key` 请从 [DeepSeek 开放平台](https://platform.deepseek.com/) 获取
translatedContent: > `api_key` Please obtain it from [DeepSeek Open Platform](https://platform.deepseek.com/)

originContent: > `enable_models` 为 [`CustomModel`](https://github.com/KomoriDev/nonebot-plugin-deepseek/blob/ee9f0b0f0568eedb3eb87423e6c1bf271787ab76/nonebot_plugin_deepseek/config.py#L34) 结构的字典，若无接入本地模型的需要则无需修改
translatedContent: > `enable_models` is a dictionary of [`CustomModel`](https://github.com/KomoriDev/nonebot-plugin-deepseek/blob/ee9f0b0f0568eedb3eb87423e6c1bf271787ab76/nonebot_plugin_deepseek/config.py#L34) structures; no modification is needed if you do not need to connect local models

originContent: > 若要接入本地模型，请参见：👉 [Wiki - 接入本地模型](https://github.com/KomoriDev/nonebot-plugin-deepseek/wiki/本地模型)
translatedContent: > To connect local models, please refer to: 👉 [Wiki - Connect Local Models](https://github.com/KomoriDev/nonebot-plugin-deepseek/wiki/%E6%9C%AC%E5%9C%B0%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B)

originContent: |              配置项              | 必填  |                             默认值                             |                                                                          说明                                                                          |
translatedContent: |          Configuration Item          | Required |                             Default Value                             |                                                                          Description                                                                          |

originContent: |        deepseek__api_key         |  是   |                               无                               |                                                                        API Key                                                                         |

|     deepseek__enable_models      |  否   | [{ "name": "deepseek-chat" }, { "name": "deepseek-reasoner" }] | 启用的模型 [配置说明](https://github.com/KomoriDev/nonebot-plugin-deepseek/wiki/%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE#enable_models-%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E) |

|         deepseek__prompt         |  否   |                               无                               |                                                                        模型预设                                                                        |

|         deepseek__stream         |  否   |                             False                              |                                                                    是否启用流式传输                                                                    |
translatedContent: |         deepseek__stream             |    No    |                               False                                 |                                                                    Whether to enable streaming transmission                                                                    |

originContent: |       deepseek__md_to_pic        |  否   |                             False                              |                                                                是否启用 Markdown 转图片                                                                |
translatedContent: |       deepseek__md_to_pic            |    No    |                               False                                 |                                                                Whether to enable Markdown to image                                                                |

originContent: |  deepseek__enable_send_thinking  |  否   |                             False                              |                                                                     是否发送思维链                                                                     |
translatedContent: |  deepseek__enable_send_thinking      |    No    |                               False                                 |                                                                     Whether to send the chain of thought                                                                     |

originContent: > 请检查你的 `COMMAND_START` 以及上述配置项。这里默认使用 `/`
translatedContent: > Please check your `COMMAND_START` and the above configuration items. The default command prefix is `/`

originContent: 快捷命令：`/ds [内容]` 或回复文本消息
translatedContent: Quick command: `/ds [content]` or reply to a text message

originContent: 快捷指令：`/ds --with-context [内容]` `/多轮对话`
快捷指令：`/深度思考 [内容]`
translatedContent: 快捷指令：`/深度思考 [内容]`

originContent: > 权限：`设置默认模型` 指令仅 SUPERUSER 可用
translatedContent: > 权限：`设置默认模型` 指令仅 SUPERUSER 可用

originContent: 快捷指令：`/模型列表` `/设置默认模型 [模型名]`
translatedContent: Quick Commands: `/model list` `/set default model [model name]`

originContent: > 该特性依赖于 [Alconna 快捷指令](https://nonebot.dev/docs/2.3.3/best-practice/alconna/command#command%E7%9A%84%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8)。自定义指令不带 `COMMAND_START`，若有必要需手动填写
translatedContent: > This feature relies on [Alconna Quick Commands](https://nonebot.dev/docs/2.3.3/best-practice/alconna/command#command%E7%9A%84%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8). Custom commands do not include `COMMAND_START`; if necessary, it must be manually added

originContent: bot: deepseek::deepseek 的快捷指令: "/chat" 添加成功
translatedContent: bot: deepseek::deepseek 的快捷指令: "/chat" 添加成功
